title: Paper Doilies 140 Pcs White Rectangle Doilies Lace Paper Placemats for Buffet Cake Fried Food Party Wedding Tableware Decoration (23x16 cm)
features: Premium Quality: Made from high quality paper, which is thin and durable, not easy to fade or break
Functional: Can absorb oil, water well. You can use it under foods to absorb oil. And it also can use on oil filtration, kitchen oil absorption
Lace Design: The lace paper doilies are white and feature a delicate retro lace pattern that add visual appeal to your table and dessert decor with an elegant and vintage fee

Wide Applications: Perfect for displaying cakes, desserts, candies, French fries, chicken wings and drumsticks, and can also be used as tableware decorations, under vases, cookie plate liners and more
Package: You will receive 140 pieces of lace paper dolls, size: 23 x 16 cm
description: Product description -------------------- Welcome to Our Shop -------------------- Packaging List: 140 pcs Paper Doilies Specification: Material: Paper Color: White Size: 23x16 cm Feature: 1. These decorative doilies don't just make food look pretty. You can also use them to make and decorate greetings cards, invitations or other little home crafting projects. 2. White paper doilies protect dishes from moisture and stains, making cleaning easier. Safety Warning Warning: Avoid placing near heat sources. Dispose properly after use to avoid fire hazards.
